name: Stunning Crystal
description: The surface of this weapon is covered with jagged lines resembling lightning bolts. A stunning weapon functions as a screaming weapon. In addition, on a successful critical hit with a stunning weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Fortitude save or be stunned for 1 round. Projectile weapons bestow this property on their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A lightning-bolt marked weapon augmentation crystal.
